query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_registros,
  COUNT(DISTINCT nrOperacao) as numeros_unicos,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT nrOperacao) as total_duplicatas
FROM consignados
WHERE nrOperacao IS NOT NULL AND nrOperacao != '';

  COUNT(*) as total_registros,
  COUNT(DISTINCT nrOperacao) as numeros_unicos,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT nrOperacao) as total_duplicatas
FROM consignados
WHERE nrOperacao IS NOT NULL AND nrOperacao != '';
